name: Low-Cholesterol Popovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C). Oil muffin tins and preheat.
2. In a bowl, combine all ingredients. Beat with a rotary beater or wire whisk until smooth.
3. Pour the batter into the hot muffin tins.
4. Bake for 35 to 45 minutes or until brown.
1 popover - 68 calories, 1 bread exchange, 11 grams carbohydrate, 3 grams protein, 1 gram fat, 82 mg sodium, 67 mg potassium, 32 mg cholesterol
Source: Am. Diabetes Assoc. Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman, 1986
Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93
